name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual expense reporting causes delays in financial insights. We automate report generation instead of manual spreadsheets and reports.
problem_solved: Manual expense reporting is time-consuming and prone to errors.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual expense reporting is time-consuming and prone to errors.
